title: Foxhole
notes: The game crashes whenever I try to go to the server browser or join a game (seems to be related to networking), if I add PROTON_LOG=1 %command% to the launch options, it loads indefinitely instead of crashing
"DX11 feature level 10.0 is required to run the engine" appears on launch
title: Foxhole

notes: Game launches into main menu. All features within this menu are fully function. The problem lies with actually connected to the servers when clicking 'join war'. The game simply does nothing when attempting to connect.
title: Foxhole

gpu: X.Org Radeon RX 560 Series (POLARIS11, DRM 3.26.0, 4.18.9-200.fc28.x86_64, LLVM 6.0.1)
notes: The game is in Early Access so some problems like occasional errors like "Lost connection to server" might be understandable. There are some minor perfomance issues that do not trouble me at all. Sometimes you can see objects loading in the distance.
title: Foxhole

notes: Game works great on Ultra Graphics. The sound however is already distorted and crackling in the menu screen. Some sounds like ambient work fine but others like water produce a crackle and lag which makes this game not comfortable to play. I have already tried the launch option "PULSE_LATENCY_MSEC=30 %command%" and tsched=0 in the pulseaudio config but it did not help it.
title: Foxhole

cpu: AMD Ryzen 5 2400G with Radeon Vega Graphics
notes:
If audio works or not seems to depend on the exact desktop environment used, e.g. audio doesn't exist on XFCE and positional/3D audio is broken on KDE Plasma(every sound you can hear, you hear at full volume as if you were next to it, which is problematic if you want to hear in game voice chat). This is compounded by the issue that the game will not respect your settings set in the menu, meaning they have to be changed occasionally back to where the game has a reasonable FPS.

Otherwise the game appears to have full functionality, other than uncommon crashes.
